subtitle: Your focus dashboard. Edit this text in priorities.json or via: desk subtitle "..."

northstar.text: What would make this week great — not just done? Set it via: desk northstar "..."

today.title: Pick the one thing that matters most right now
today.context: This is a starter item. Replace it with a real priority via `desk add-today --title "..."` or by running the refresh (see README).

sections.heading: Do this now
sections.body: Open priorities.json, or run `desk add-today --title "..."`. Write a real priority: something concrete that ships today. Then delete this starter item with `desk remove first-priority`.

sections.heading: How this works
sections.body: The dashboard pushes updates live via SSE. Run `./scripts/refresh.sh manual` to let the configured LLM regenerate this file from your activity context.
